## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --locked` passes
- [ ] Manually ran the TUI against a real terminal and verified the affected codepath (or this is a non-runtime change)
- [ ] If this changes config or behaviour: `docs/configuration.md` and/or the README are updated
- [ ] If this adds a new provider tag or env var: `docs/providers.md` is updated

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything you'd want a reviewer to look at first, gotchas, follow-ups deferred to a later PR, etc. -->
